texto: In the life of mathematics two plus two makes four
autor: but in the mathematics of life two and two can make five or even three sometimes
explicacao: Citação de but in the mathematics of life two and two can make five or even three sometimes sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In the life of mathematics two plus two makes four” articula reflexao, munia-khan, mathematics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
